verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Bride of Christ is returning Back to the Word, As it was in the beginning Before the fall of man. We're a people that's peculiar, Believers with a Message; Christ has called us out from bondage, Reunited with Him.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We are a Chosen Generation, We are Elected Seed of God, Predestinated by foreknowledge We are heirs of a new home; And by the Life that's in the Blood, We're given entrance to the throne. Yes, we're children of Almighty God, He takes care of His own.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now we've been privileged To go within the veil With this revealed Word of the hour; Without Its anchor and Its Token There'll not be one to make it through. Oh this Word, It must be written on the table of your heart; Speak this Word, Get It into your spirit and It never shall depart.
